---
title: "projects"
---

---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Movie Box Office Regression Analysis

**Overview:**  
Built a multiple linear regression project in R to study how movie reviews and related features influenced box office revenue.

**My Contribution:**  
Worked on data analysis, diagnostic plots, model interpretation, and presentation of findings.

**Tools:**  
R, regression analysis, data visualization

---

## Penguin Species Classification Model

**Overview:**  
Developed a machine learning model in Python to classify penguin species using both numerical and categorical features.

**My Contribution:**  
Helped preprocess the data, build the model, and evaluate predictive performance.

**Tools:**  
Python, pandas, machine learning

---

## Dating Profile Data Visualization Project

**Overview:**  
Created a Tableau-based group project analyzing dating profile data to identify trends and patterns in self-presentation.

**My Contribution:**  
Contributed to analysis, visualization design, and communicating results in a presentation.

**Tools:**  
Tableau, data visualization, exploratory data analysis

---

## Add More Projects Here

For each project, use this format:

### Project Title

**Overview:**  
1–2 sentences explaining the problem or goal.

**My Contribution:**  
What you specifically did.

**Tools:**  
List tools, skills, or methods.

**Link:**  
[GitHub Repo](https://github.com/yourusername/project)  
or  
[Report / Writeup](https://...)
